PROOF OF SERVICE OF DECLARATION OF GURSON S. DANG RE FILING 140 PAGES FROM THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT THAT HAD 280 PAGES MISTAKENLY SCANNED INTO THE SYSTEM ON JULY 30, 2015 AS IS EXPLAINED IN PLAINTIFFS ATTACHED LETTERS OF OCT 2, 2015 & OCT 23, 2015 AND LETTER OF 15 2015 FROM OF STATE FARM'S COUNSEL JENNY J. CHIU ESQ. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DANG, GURSON S.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PETER VAN ZANDT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF GURSON S. DANG IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. SEE CCP 430.10(E). PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ALLEGE A BREACH OF CONTRACT CAUSE OF ACTION. THE ATTACHMENTS TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT INDICATE THAT DEFENDANT MERELY ACTED AS COUNSEL AND WAS NOT A PARTY TO THE CONTRACT/SETTLEMENT. THE FRAUDULENT INDUCEMENT AND MISREPRESENTATION CAUSES OF ACTION ARE TIME BARRED PER CCP 338. THE AMENDED COMPLAINT SHOWS THAT THE SETTLEMENT WAS ENTERED INTO IN 8/10 AND PLAINTIFF FILED THIS ACTION MORE THAN 3 YEARS LATER. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO EXPLAIN HOW HIS CLAIMS AROSE AT A DATE LATER THAN 8/10 OR HOW THE DISCOVERY RULE APPLIES. THE COURT SUSTAINS THE DEMURRER TO THE DURESS AND UNCONSCIONABILITY "CAUSES OF ACTION" BECAUSE THOSE ARE DEFENSES, NOT AFFIRMATIVE CLAIMS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION AND PROVIDES NO INFORMATION REGARDING HOW HE CAN CURE THE DEFECTIVE PLEADING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

DECLARATION OF GURSON S. DANG THAT DESPITE A FAVORABLE RULING ON DEC. 28.2015 TO HIS DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FAC, (WHERE PLAINTIFF COULD NOT QUALIFY FOR ORAL ARGUMENT BECAUSE THE TOTAL OMMISSION EVERYWHERE IF COUNSEL'S EMAIL ADDRESS) DEFENDANT PETER J. VAN ZANDT, ESQ. ALSO A JUDGE PRO TEM, HAS ACCUMULATED AN ASTONISHING DELAY (DURING WHICH SANCTIONS WERE IMPOSED ON HIS LAWYER AND FORMER LAW PARTNER AT BLEDSOE LAW FIRM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN JUDGMENT FOLLO- COURT ORDER OF DEC.28'15, WHICH PLAINTIFF DANG BELIEVES HAD TO DO WITH SERIOUS DISTORTIONS IN THIS DEFENDANT'S PLEADINGS(AS WELL AS BY CO-DEFENDANT STATE FARM'S), TO CITE ONE EXAMPLE DEFENDANTS COLLUDED TO FRAUDULENTLY BASE THEIR DEMURRERS, NOT ON THE 140 PAGE OF THE FAC SERVED ON THEM, BUT INSTEAD BASE THEIR PLEADINGS JUST ON THE FIRST 30-PAGES THEY DOWN-LOADED FROM A DEFECTEDLY SCANNED 280 PAGE FAC (WHICH THEY KNEW NEEDED CORRECTION) LEADING THIS PLAINTIFF TO OPPOSE THE TENTATIVE RULING ON JAN. 14,16 RE CO-DEFENDANT STATE FARM'S DEMURRER REQUESTING THAT THIS DEMURRER BE THROWN OUT BASED ON PLAINTFF'S BELIEF THAT A FRAUD WAS BEING PERPETUATED ON THIS SUPERIOR COURT--AS PER ATTACHED 9-PAGE COURT REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT AND OTHER RELATED EXHIBITS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DANG, GURSON S.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DANG, GURSON S.

DECLARATION OF GURSON S. DANG RE: ENTERING INTO THE OFFICIAL RECORDS OF TWO RELEVENT DOCUMENTS, THE FIRST OF WHICH IS THE 9-PAGE TRANSCRIPT BY COURT REPORTER SHERRY SAWYER OF THE PROCEEDINGS BEFORE THE HON. ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH WHERE SANDRA E. STONE APPEARED FOR CO-DEFENDANT STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY, WITH THE PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER AND THE SECOND DOCUMENT IS AN 8-PAGE LETTER SENT BY LAWYER JAMES M. TREPPA REPRESENTING THE PRIMARY DEFENDANT PETER J. VAN ZANDT WHICH LETTER WAS DELIVERED BY MESSENGER TO THE CLERK OF DEPARTMENT 302 WITH THE REQUEST THAT "THIS LETTER BE FORWARDED TO JUDGE KAHN FILED BY PLAINTIFF DANG, GURSON S.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Plaintiff Gurson Dang telephone number 415-665-5000 in Propria Persona.
Sandra Stone of LHB Pacific Law Partners, LLP telephone number 510-841-7777 for Defendant/Moving Party State Farm Insurance.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to state a cause of action and provides no information regarding how he can cure the defective pleading. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-28-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PETER VAN ZANDT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF GURSON S. DANG is sustained without leave to amend. See CCP 430.10(e). Plaintiff fails to allege a breach of contract cause of action. The attachments to the amended complaint indicate that defendant merely acted as counsel and was not a party to the contract/settlement. The fraudulent inducement and misrepresentation causes of action are time barred per CCP 338. The amended complaint shows that the settlement was entered into in 8/10 and plaintiff filed this action more than 3 years later. Plaintiff fails to explain how his claims arose at a date later than 8/10 or how the discovery rule applies. The court sustains the demurrer to the duress and unconscionability "causes of action" because those are defenses, not affirmative claims. Order signed.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
